input: Please draft my first week plan.
expected_behavior: First-ever plan (no prior WeekPlan). pending_approval.is_first_plan=true and headline is first-plan framing (e.g. Here's your first week), NOT 'a small tweak'.
reply:
Perfect! Let's get your first week rolling. You've got gym access and want to train 3× per week for fat loss, so I'm building a **full-body split** that hits all the major muscle groups each session while leaving room for recovery. You'll also have walking on non-gym days to keep your step count up and support your calorie deficit.

Your calendar is clear this week—no conflicts—so I've slotted sessions for **Monday, Wednesday, and Friday** with walking on the off days.

### **Nutrition (starting estimates)**
- **~1,800 kcal/day** *(starting estimate—share your weight to refine this)*
- **~120 g protein/day** *(starting estimate—share your weight to refine this)*

Since you're vegetarian, focus on lentils, chickpeas, tofu, tempeh, Greek yogurt, cottage cheese, eggs, and protein powder to hit that protein target.

**What's your current weight?** I'll tighten these targets once I know.

---

### **Week at a glance**
- **Mon/Wed/Fri:** Full-body gym sessions (~45 min each)
- **Tue/Thu/Sat/Sun:** Walking (30–45 min, easy pace)

Each gym day will include a squat or hinge pattern, a push, a pull, and optional core/accessory work—all beginner-friendly and gym-appropriate.

Here's your first week—take a look below.

days.focus: Full body — Goblet Squat (legs_002), Flat Dumbbell Press (chest_004), Lat Pulldown (back_007), Glute Bridge (legs_013)
Full body — Leg Press (legs_004), Push-Up Standard (chest_010), Seated Cable Row (back_008), Step-Up (legs_016)
Full body — Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift (back_004), Incline Dumbbell Press (chest_003), Dumbbell Single-Arm Row (back_010), Standing Calf Raise (legs_014)

proposed_plan.notes: Volume 3 full-body scaffold for fat loss, 3 gym sessions/week. KB exercises: legs_002, chest_004, back_007, legs_013, legs_004, chest_010, back_008, legs_016, back_004, chest_003, back_010, legs_014. Macros are starting estimates pending weight_kg.

pending_approval.headline: Here's your first week
pending_approval.subhead: The AI Coaching Team drafted this starting plan — only if it works for you.

judge_scores.notes: The response effectively outlines a beginner-friendly plan while maintaining a supportive tone.

input: I'm traveling Thu–Fri — rebuild my week around hotel bodyweight work.
expected_behavior: Existing profile with a prior week plan; travel adjustment. pending_approval.is_first_plan=false and headline uses tweak framing (A small tweak to your week).
reply:
Perfect—no calendar conflicts, so I'll work from your stated travel window. Since you're away Thu–Fri, I'll shift your three sessions to **Mon, Tue, Wed** and swap Friday's upper session for hotel bodyweight work.

**Week of July 14, 2026**

- **Mon** – Full body gym (45 min) – your usual strength session
- **Tue** – Hotel bodyweight upper/lower circuit (40 min) – Push-Up Standard, Reverse Lunge, Superman Hold, Bodyweight Squat
- **Wed** – Lower gym (40 min) – hit legs hard before you travel
- **Thu–Fri** – Travel days (rest or optional walk)

**Nutrition:**
~2,100 kcal *(starting estimate—share your weight to refine this)* | ~140 g protein *(starting estimate—share your weight to refine this)*

**What's your current weight?** I'll tighten these targets once I know.

Here's your first week—take a look below.

days.focus: Hotel bodyweight — Push-Up Standard (chest_010), Reverse Lunge (legs_006), Superman Hold (back_014), Bodyweight Squat (legs_007)

proposed_plan.notes: User traveling Thu–Fri; shifted 3×/wk to Mon/Tue/Wed. Tue = hotel bodyweight (chest_010, legs_006, back_014, legs_007). Macros provisional—no weight_kg on profile.

pending_approval.headline: A small tweak to your week
pending_approval.subhead: The AI Coaching Team lined up these adjustments — only if they work for you.

judge_scores.notes: The response is well-structured, realistic, and supportive.
